title: Izmaost's Softer Weather
description: Retextures the Vanilla textures into a softer, texture. Includes animated splashes
body:
## ⭐️Fancy Weather :D⭐️ Izmaost's Softer Weather is a resource pack that changes the particles for weather in Minecraft. The pack also adds animated spalsh particles as the vanilla ones feel stiff and boring.
## 📋 Requirements 📋 This pack does not require Optifine or any texture stitching mod to work. Other flower texture packs do not work with this pack. For any issues, questions or requests feel free to reach out on KoFi! ## 🎨 My Creations 🎨 Here you can find resourcepacks made by me: [Izmaost's Animated Foliage](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/izmaosts-animated-foliage) [Izmaost's Animated Flora](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/izmaosts-animated-flora) [Izmaost's Floral Redstone](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/izmaosts-floral-redstone) [Izmaost's Minimalist Redstone](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/izmaosts-minimalistic-redstone) [Izmaost's Modern Kitchen](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/izmaosts-modern-kitchen) [Izmaost's Glazed Terracotta](https://modrinth.com/project/izmaosts-glazed-terracotta) [Izmaost's Softer Weather](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/izmaosts-softer-weather) [Izmaost's Autumnal Birch](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/izmaosts-autumnal-birch)
